negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_b07db007-387f-45a5-938a-2adb8f90aed5
prompt: A wide shot captures the elegant interior of a luxurious hallway, showcasing a centered passageway adorned with a richly patterned carpet in deep purple-blue hues, accented with swirls of pink, white-silver, and peach. The camera shakily pushes in, revealing four curved, shiny, ornate wooden counters on the left, each with a cream-colored countertop supporting a silver-colored candelabra and two lamps on either side of a vertically extending rod with a rectangular, black object at the top. Small, black, four-sided devices are visible on most of the desks, with the tops of two other apparatuses partially visible behind them. The fronts of these desks are adorned with swirling, gold patterns, mirroring the designs on the carpet, with gold trim at the bottom. Large, round windows on the left allow bright, natural light to flood the space.  On the right side of the corridor, a curved, clear railing with intricate, swirling designs overlooks an area below. Two round, white columns stand prominently on the right, and the light-colored ceiling is embellished with the same ornate pattern, featuring two luminous, small, green signs hanging from it. Toward the end of the video, a male figure, slightly balding and dressed in a white shirt, dark bottoms, and a blue face mask, stands behind the fourth desktop. He briefly glances up at the camera as it advances, then lowers his head. A fifth counter, similar to the others but much lower, comes into view, with two brown chairs positioned in front of it and a vase with light-blue flowers resting on top. Gentle, recessed artificial lighting, along with a chandelier and additional light fixtures against the walls behind the desks, bathes the hallway in a warm and inviting glow.
